raw_text:
Subject: Formal Workplace Complaint

Dear HR,

I would like to file a formal complaint regarding my manager. 
Over the past few weeks, he has been making inappropriate remarks 
during team meetings and creating a hostile work environment.

This situation has made me feel uncomfortable and stressed at work.

I would appreciate if this matter could be reviewed as soon as possible.

Sincerely,
Fatima Khaled

intake.reasoning: The request is for a formal workplace complaint, which requires human intervention and is not an autonomous task.

task.title: Formal Workplace Complaint
task.description: A formal complaint is being filed regarding a manager's inappropriate remarks during team meetings, creating a hostile work environment.
task.action_required: Review the formal complaint regarding the manager's behavior.
task.success_criteria: The complaint is thoroughly investigated and appropriate action is taken to resolve the issue.

raw_text:
Subject: Annual Leave Balance Request

Hello HR,

I am planning to submit a vacation request for next month and wanted to confirm 
how many annual leave days I currently have remaining.

Could you please share my available leave balance?

Kind regards,
Mohamed Ali

intake.reasoning: The request is for leave balance information, which is a straightforward inquiry that can be handled autonomously.

task.title: Annual Leave Balance Inquiry
task.description: The employee, Mohamed Ali, is planning to submit a vacation request for next month and wants to confirm his remaining annual leave days.
task.action_required: Share the employee's available leave balance.
task.success_criteria: The employee receives his current annual leave balance.

raw_text:
Subject: Follow-up on Expense Report Submission

Dear Finance Team,

I wanted to check on the status of my expense report that I submitted last Tuesday 
for the Cairo conference travel.

My name is Sarah Ahmed, and the report included hotel and transportation expenses.

Please let me know if anything else is needed from my side.

Thank you,
Sarah Ahmed

intake.reasoning: The request is a follow-up on the status of an expense report submission, which is classified as an autonomous task in the Finance department.

task.title: Expense Report Status Inquiry
task.description: Sarah Ahmed is inquiring about the status of her expense report for the Cairo conference travel, which was submitted last Tuesday and included hotel and transportation expenses.
task.action_required: Investigate the status of Sarah Ahmed's expense report and respond with an update.
task.success_criteria: Sarah Ahmed receives a response with the current status of her expense report.

raw_text:
Subject: Cannot Log Into Work Account

Hello,

I forgot my password and now I cannot log into my company account. 
Could you please reset my password for the account john.doe@company.com?

This is preventing me from accessing internal systems.

Best regards,
John Doe

intake.reasoning: The request is for a password reset, which is a routine and autonomous task handled by the IT department.

task.title: Password Reset Request
task.description: John Doe forgot his password and cannot log into his company account, preventing access to internal systems. He requests a password reset for his account john.doe@company.com.
task.action_required: Reset the password for the account john.doe@company.com.
task.success_criteria: John Doe can log into his company account successfully.

raw_text:
Subject: Urgent Laptop Replacement Needed

Hi IT Team,

My laptop screen cracked this morning after it slipped from my desk. 
The display is flickering badly and I can barely read anything on it.

I need a replacement as soon as possible since I use this laptop for daily reporting and meetings.

Thanks,
Ahmed Hassan
Finance Department

intake.reasoning: The request is for a laptop replacement, which requires human intervention and approval, hence it is not autonomous.

task.title: Laptop Replacement Needed
task.description: The requester's laptop screen cracked and the display is flickering, making it difficult to use for daily reporting and meetings.
task.action_required: Replace the requester's laptop as soon as possible.
task.success_criteria: The requester receives a functional replacement laptop and can resume daily reporting and meetings without technical issues.
